CustomField.description: True if Start Date <= TODAY and either End Date >= TODAY or End Date = NULL
CustomField.formula: /* Check if Promo Code is valid today: True if Start Date <= TODAY and either End Date >= TODAY or End Date = NULL */ AND( StartDate__c <= TODAY(), OR( EndDate__c >= TODAY(), ISNULL(EndDate__c) ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: True if Start Date <= TODAY and either End Date >= TODAY or End Date = NULL
CustomField.label: Is Active
